name: Black Metal Adjustable Table Lamp with Bronze Finish - Threshold™: ETL Listed, Metal Shade, 1-Way Socket Switch
description: Add a sleek touch to your desktop with the Adjustable Table Lamp from Threshold™. At 21.5 inches in height, this freestanding table lamp has a sleek tubular body atop a round base in black finish. It has an adjustable, angular arm in a bronze tone, topped with a cone metal shade in black hanging downward. This decorative table lamp allows you to find the perfect lighting height with the adjustable arm, making it excellent for focusing light wherever you need it.
